message:
🐛 Fix fetchSingleClusterHealth auth test using wrong localStorage key (#10397)

The test set localStorage key 'token' but fetchSingleClusterHealth reads
'kc-agent-token' (AGENT_TOKEN_STORAGE_KEY) since PR #10381. Update both
auth tests to use the correct key.

Fixes #10395

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
